```{=typst}
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
// CONTEXTUAL RECOMMENDATION 1 — after Day 3 (Trigger Map worksheet)
// Mindset: the reader has just mapped the situation around one purchase and is
// curious about what sits beneath it. This page connects everyday triggers to
// the possibility of deeper, learned money beliefs, and invites a calm, optional
// deeper exploration. Distinct CENTERED / STACKED editorial composition (image
// as a centred hero above a centred headline and a single reading column) so it
// reads as part of the lesson, not a sales interruption. Same brand system
// (ivory ground, gold keyline, deep-green type, gold accents).
//
// This is an UNNUMBERED editorial insert. We render it inside a scoped `page(..)`
// with `footer: none` so the page number is hidden ON THIS PAGE ONLY — the shared
// `wcg-nums` state is left untouched so every following lesson keeps its footer
// number. We also do not count this page toward the visible numbering, so the
// numbered sequence of the lessons stays continuous.
// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
#page(footer: none, numbering: none)[
  #counter(page).update(n => n - 1)
  #place(top + left, dx: -(mg-x - 0.55in), dy: -(mg-y - 0.5in),
    rect(width: 7.4in, height: 10in, stroke: 0.75pt + c-gold, radius: 3pt))
  #v(1fr)
  #align(center)[
    // ---- hero: the Money Script visual, centred, uncropped ----
    #image("assets/images/money-script-mockup.jpg", height: 2.15in)
    #v(20pt)
    #text(font: ("Manrope",), size: 11pt, weight: 600, tracking: 3pt, fill: c-gold)[RECOMMENDED DEEPER EXPLORATION]
    #v(12pt)
    #text(font: ("Cormorant Garamond",), size: 26pt, weight: 700, fill: c-deep)[
      What May Be Shaping These\
      Patterns Beneath the Surface?
    ]
    #v(10pt)
    #line(length: 12%, stroke: 1pt + c-gold)
  ]
  #v(18pt)
  // ---- single centred reading column ----
  #align(center, block(width: 84%, {
    set par(justify: false, leading: 0.72em, spacing: 10pt)
    set text(font: ("Manrope",), size: 10.5pt, fill: c-body)
    align(left)[
      You've just mapped the situations, feelings, and cues surrounding one of your
      repeated financial choices.

      Sometimes these patterns are shaped not only by the moment itself, but also by
      beliefs and expectations that developed much earlier.

      The free Money Script presentation explores how repeated experiences and
      underlying beliefs may influence the way people think about earning, saving,
      spending, and financial opportunities.

      If today's Trigger Map helped you recognize a pattern, this presentation is the
      recommended next place to explore it more deeply.
    ]
  }))
  #v(18pt)
  // ---- calm, prominent CTA ----
  #align(center, block(width: 66%,
    link("https://399ebep0yf69650bpihrv-vewe.hop.clickbank.net")[
      #box(width: 100%, fill: c-deep, radius: 6pt, inset: (x: 22pt, y: 15pt))[
        #align(center, text(font: ("Manrope",), size: 11.5pt, weight: 700, fill: c-ivory)[
          Explore the Free Money Script Presentation #sym.arrow.r
        ])
      ]
    ]))
  #v(9pt)
  #align(center, text(font: ("Manrope",), style: "italic", size: 9pt, fill: c-num)[
    This recommended third-party resource contains an affiliate link.
  ])
  #v(1fr)
]
```
